doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document falsely states tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, contradicting Illinois eviction law which requires judicial proceedings before any forced removal.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: This document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois eviction law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, when Illinois law actually requires landlords to file eviction suits and obtain court orders before forced removal, and HUD would never co-issue such legally erroneous guidance.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 98
REASON: The document falsely states tenants must vacate within 5 days without court process, contradicting Illinois eviction law which requires judicial proceedings before any forced removal.
